feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Fiori App ''My Inbox' Enhancement Requirement
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We are looking to enhance the 'My Inbox' Fiori app for additional fields for PR and PO Approvals. We are looking for suggestions from SAP to approach this requirement.

 

Issue Details:

  1. New field will be made visible in 'My Inbox' App for PR and PO Approvals.
  2. Value for the new field will be based on data stored in SAP Tables.
  3. We need to understand the feasibility of the above requirement.
  4. If feasible what is the correct technical approach to this requirement?
  5. Are there any predefined hook up points or BADI available to make this enhancement?
  6. What are the supposed changes from ABAP and Fiori point of view?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: sap capm custom function not supporting $filter query param.
entry.content:
Hi
I have a custom function which will return LargeBinary as response. Now I want to use $filter query Param in the function url.

I will be handling this $filter inside my handler. Is it allowed in Capm, If so how can I achive it.


Below is what I want to Use, I want to pass my filter in the $filter query params.

entry.title: How to Set Facets Visibility in CDS Based on a Feature Toggle?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm working with cds and have a scenario where I want to conditionally show/hide a facet based on a feature toggle. The facet should only be visible in the UI if the feature toggle is ON.

Is there a way to conditionally set field visibility in the .cds file or through annotations, based on a feature toggle? Has anyone implemented something similar and can share best practices or code snippets?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Extend/Copy CDS view for fiori app
entry.content:
Hi All,

There is a standard Fiori app for compare supplier quotation which displays the quotations which are created via Fiori app. This Fiori app is built based on CDS view/OData. My requirement is exactly same but to fetch quotations which are created in GUI. The CDS view(I_RequestForQuotation) where condition has hardcoding to bring the quotations of particular document category. I cannot edit where condition since it is standard. 

Can anyone suggest me how can i achieve this functionality?

Is copying the whole list of objects (Fiori app/CDS views/OData/UI5) to custom is the only way or any other possible simple solutions here?

I can provide more information on the requirement if needed.

Thanks,

Sai.

entry.title: Upgrade 1709 to SAP 2023 On-Premise from front/back end to embedded catalog
entry.content:
Does anyone know how to export/download catalogs and tiles?  I just need the Z* ones.   I can't seem to find anything.   The front-end system has been converted to 2023.   But we want to embed the system.   To do this all the catalogs and tiles have to be moved.   I can't seem to find anything on it.   And it seems like it would be a common request.  So I hate to ask.  I'll keep looking as well.  But any help would be appreciated.

Thank you!

Michelle

entry.title: Enhancing VIM fiori app Gateway service
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I am trying to check for the feasiblity to enhance the gateway service for Vendor Invoice management application provided by OpenText. The gateway service is PF05_DATA. I have run through a few posts but there is not enough information that helps me to understand if this gateway service can be enhanced. I could only get the service name and the data provider class. The data provider class has various FMs one of which is /OTX/PF62_GET_3_OBJECTS, is it possible to enhance this FM for a different set of users without impacting the existing Fiori app functionality and how do we enhance ?

entry.title: SAC embed mode not working on mobile devices
entry.content:
Hi all,

We tried to integrate sac content (stories etc) via iframe in our Fiori System. It works in the browsers on laptops but not on mobile devices. The issue: because the fiori url is different from the iframe url (sapanalyticscloud….) . Because of this the Story will not open on iOS devices (for example).I figured That this is because of the Setting „Prevent Cross Site Tracking“. I think this is also because we have idp in between and using saml for auth. Anyone having the same issue? Unfortunately sap do not offering proxy urls so you could have sac in your own url area.

Ideally we would like to keep fiori as our single point of entry for our users…

entry.title: Guidance on Building an APK for SAP Fiori Application with Zebra Laser Scanner Integration
entry.content:
We are developing a SAP Fiori application and need to integrate it with a Zebra device equipped with a laser scanner (specifically, a Zebra scanner with laser scanning capabilities). Our goal is to build an APK file for this Fiori application to run on Android-based Zebra devices, ensuring seamless barcode scanning functionality.

  • APK Build Process: What are the steps to build a custom SAP Fiori Client APK that integrates with the Zebra laser scanner? Please provide details on the tools, plugins, or SDKs required (e.g., Zebra Scanner SDK for Android or SAP Fiori Client Cordova plugins).
  • Zebra Scanner Integration: How can we ensure the Zebra laser scanner is properly integrated into the Fiori application? Is there a specific Cordova plugin or Zebra SDK (e.g., DataWedge or EMDK) recommended for laser scanner functionality?

entry.title: SAP RAP Free Search and list sort in Fiori Application
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

While creating a sample RAP application from the SAP Learning course "Building Apps with the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model" 

I am caught with 2 issues

1. Free search is not working in the Fiori app. 

Images of BO projection

Fiori Application Data

 

with Free Search

 

 

2. Sorting Order of the List in the Fiori Application

Any advice that could help me understand why I am encountering the above issues would be greatly appreciated.

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model SAP Fiori SAP BTP ABAP environment

entry.title: Issue with MultiComboBox after upgrade to UI5 version 1.120.14
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Recently we have upgraded our HANA version from 2020 to 2023 and also the UI5 version from 1.84 to 1.120.14.

After upgrade the MultiComboBox  is not working as expected in the Custom Fiori Applications, the dropdowns values are unable to unselect. 

OnAfterrendering by default we are setting all values are selected but when we try to unselect its not working. Its working fine in the non upgraded system. 

Can someone suggest how to fix this issue ? Found one below note which is for combobox not Multicombobox. Does this apply for Multicombobox aswell ? Please suggest 

https://me.sap.com/notes/0003553710

 

KR,

Anji

entry.title: I am working on sap Adaptation .i want trigger,formatter in controller but it's not triggering
entry.content:
hi Guys 

I working on sap Adaptation project (F0349). I have written formatter function for the table cells. in controller but the formatter function in controller is not triggering .

any suggestions.

entry.title: Pagination / Lazy Loading / "Load more" not working in Fiori Elements Table Facet with Custom Entity
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I built a Fiori Elements App with an Object Page. On the Object Page, I created a Facet resulting in a Responsive Table:

 @ui: { facet: [  { id: 'History',
                    purpose: #STANDARD,
                    type: #LINEITEM_REFERENCE,
                    label: 'History',
                    targetElement: '_Log',
                    position: 40 } ],
         identification: [ { position: 1 } ],
         lineItem: [ { position: 1, label: 'Internal ID' } ] }

The referenced association "_Log" is refering to a Custom Entity that implements pagination as follows:

DATA(top) = io_request->get_paging( )->get_page_size( ).

    IF top < 0.
      top = 50.
    ENDIF.


    DATA(skip) = io_request->get_paging( )->get_offset( ).

    IF top IS NOT INITIAL OR skip IS NOT INITIAL.
      /iwbep/cl_mgw_data_util=>paging( EXPORTING is_paging = VALUE #( top  = top
                                                                      skip = skip )
                                       CHANGING  ct_data   = lt_result ).
    ENDIF.

    IF io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested( ).
      io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lines( lt_result ) ).
    ENDIF.
    io_response->set_data( lt_result ).

The problem is that the responsive table does not show the "Load more" button and is not scrollable:

Hence there is no possibility to trigger a second page call (normally done via "load more" or scrolling) and the amount of line items is always limited to the initial amount (in my case 10). All further entries are cut off.

Do you guys see a mistake in the implementation?
Thanks in advance for your help! 😊

Best regards,
Lukas

entry.title: How to filter and report on key purchase order and delivery cases in SAP Fiori apps?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I’m working on reporting for the following scenarios in SAP Fiori, ideally using the “Monitor Purchase Order Items” app or similar standard apps:

  1. Deliveries that should be in transit but currently are not showing as such.

  2. Purchase orders created more than 1 week ago but without an order confirmation (no confirmation received).

  3. Purchase orders that should be shipped but have no communication number (container reference).

  4. Overdue purchase orders including escalation and reminder logic.

  5. Unconfirmed purchase orders with planned delivery dates within the next 12 weeks.

Could you please advise:

  • Which SAP Fiori apps are best suited for these cases?

  • How to set up the necessary filters for each case (especially for order confirmation and delivery status)?

  • Any tips on handling missing communication numbers or tracking shipment status in standard apps?

  • Best practices for overdue orders reporting with escalation in SAP?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: I want to use T table example T095 in rap
entry.content:
if_rap_query_provider~select

SELECT * FROM T095 into table @DATA(lt_t095).

Hello expert, I would like to use the T table, but it indicates that it is not allowed. Is there any other alternative method

entry.title: Is it possible to call destination in template list report page?
entry.content: Is it possible to call destination in template list report page?

entry.title: BPI_FORMS_RUNTIME_SERVER_ERROR: Unable to each runtime server
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I’m currently working on a Business Process project using SAP Build Process Automation, and I’ve encountered a runtime server issue when trying to import the task UI of the workflow. The error message displayed is:

 

Process followed : 

1. Verify the HTML5 Applications in BTP :

2. Import your SAP UI5 form in SAP Build Process Automation



3. Filled the Import Form details:

 

Issue  : 





What I’ve Tried

  • Verified that all services in SAP BTP Cockpit are up and running.

  • Checked for any missing form configurations or deployment issues.

  • Tried redeploying the process and re-authenticating with my BTP account.

What I Need Help With

  • What exactly causes the BPI_FORMS_RUNTIME_SERVER_ERROR?

  • Are there specific services or destinations that must be enabled for the runtime server to be reachable?

  • Has anyone faced similar issues when working with SAP Build Process Automation forms or workflows?


    Environment Details

    • SAP BTP: Cloud Foundry environment

    • Service: SAP Build Process Automation

    • Use Case: Custom workflow with Task UI used for approvals

 

 

If anyone has faced and resolved this issue or has any insights your help would be greatly appreciated. Please feel free to share possible causes or diagnostic steps to try.

Thanks in advance!

 

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: How to achieve the data refresh in canvas page from list report SAP Fiori application?
entry.content:
We were given a task to improve a back-end RAP List Report application by including an action button, when clicked, opens a page with the tab-view data for the selected table rows. By using the canvas page extension scenario by referring this URL below
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/steps-to-navigate-to-a-canvas-custom-page-in-list-report-application/ba-p/13535400
as well as the SAP demo kit, I was able to accomplish this. But the issue is: When I navigate back to the first page (List report page) and again navigating to this canvas page after clicking the action button, the page does not load with the updated data; instead, the initially loaded data or screen remains visible, and the page does not automatically refresh with the newly selected table data.

I would like to find a way to make this UI page automatically load with the most recent data while navigating.

I am using below code for navigation:

this.extensionAPI.getNavigationController().navigateInternal({
                target: {
                    semanticObject: "repairpc",
                    action: "toCorrectionPage"
                }
            }, {
                routeName: "toCorrectionPage"
            });

On first navigation I have selected two rows, now on second navigation, I am selecting three rows as below screenshot and clicking on any of the actions button and navigating to a canvas page (UI page).

After Navigating, the below canvas page is still with the previous data, automatic refresh is not happening and after initial page load, onInit, onAfterRendering any of these functions aren't being triggered.

Anyone please assist me by providing any solutions/suggestions.

entry.title: OVP Cards with Mobile and Tablet
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I’ve developed an OVP application that includes chart and table cards. The app functions perfectly on laptops and larger screens. However, I'm encountering some issues when accessing it on smaller devices such as tablets and mobile phones:

  • Dragging functionality does not work as expected; attempting to drag a card results in the card being deleted.

  • For the table card, only three columns are visible. There’s no option to drag or scroll to view the remaining columns.

Could you please advise on how to resolve these issues?

Best regards,

Abdul

entry.title: 'IAM APP' does not appear in eclipse
entry.content:
Hi guys

In eclipse I right click on the package and select New > Other Repository Object.

I try to create an 'IAM app' but it doesn't appear as if it doesn't exist:

I tried reinstalling the ABAP tools but the error persists

entry.title: RAP on Dynamic Condition Tables – Draft Enablement Challenge
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m working on a requirement where the underlying tables are dynamic (condition tables). I need to build a RAP application on top of this setup. However, I'm facing a challenge: I can't enable draft functionality because the CDS view is a query implemented by a class, and draft is not supported in this scenario.

Draft functionality is crucial for my use case. Does anyone have experience with a similar setup or suggestions on how to handle this? Any ideas on enabling draft or dynamically handling such data in a RAP application would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!
